title: How do I combine two text columns? Such as merging first & last name
excerpt:
I’m trying to set Monday.com up as a CRM. I prefer separating first and last names as unique columns, but I am seeing that is not ideal in Monday when mirroring other accounts. 
Is it possible to make a formula which com…

posts.author: bysam (SB)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to set Monday.com up as a CRM. I prefer separating first and last names as unique columns, but I am seeing that is not ideal in Monday when mirroring other accounts.

Is it possible to make a formula which combines the first and second text columns together, which would place the first and last name in a single column?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there @bysam - Welcome to the community. Yes, this is easy to do. Here’s a video clip demonstrating how: Screen Recording 2020-11-28...

posts.author: bysam (SB)
posts.cookedHtml:
@PolishedGeek thank you so much!! That was beyond easy.

The formula for anyone quickly searching:

{Name of first column}&" "&{Name of second column}
